title: sigesbeckia australiensis subsp. australiensis
intro: Sigesbeckia australiensis subsp. australiensis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the yellow arnica or St. Barnaby's thistle. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sigesbeckia australiensis subsp. australiensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used topically in the form of a cream or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
